layman_headline: Crypto market is bleeding — patience beats bravery right now.
layman_explanation: Bitcoin has fallen below $60,000 and is heading for back-to-back quarterly losses. The Fear & Greed Index is at 18 (Extreme Fear), meaning almost everyone is scared. Most coins on our watchlist are either crashing hard or have already pumped too much to safely buy. In times like these, the smartest move is often to wait for the dust to settle rather than try to catch a falling knife.
layman_action: Do not buy anything today. Wait for signs of stabilization — ideally Bitcoin holding above $58,000 and the Fear & Greed index starting to recover above 20-25. Keep cash ready for when a clear bounce setup emerges.
expert_reasoning: Every candidate has a fatal flaw right now. VELVET is up 272% in 7 days with RSI at 70 — textbook blow-off top risk with an unfavorable 0.66x risk/reward ratio. GWEI is up 58% weekly, also extended. TRUMP has a deeply oversold RSI of 27 which is attractive, but Three Black Crows pattern and bearish chart bias of -1.4 signal continued downtrend — catching this knife requires confirmation first. WLD dropped 30% but shows a Bearish Marubozu with -0.3 chart bias, no reversal signal. ENA is in a clear downtrend with -1.4 chart bias and bearish structure. SOL shows relative strength but lacks chart analysis data to confirm entry. In Extreme Fear with BTC breaking $60K, the probability of further downside across altcoins is elevated. The disciplined move is to preserve capital and wait for reversal confirmation.
risk_factors: BTC could break below $58K support triggering a broader altcoin capitulation wave
Binance MiCA-related outflows and regulatory pressure could accelerate selling
Extreme Fear has been worsening week-over-week (15→18 yesterday, 16.9 avg) — no sign of bottoming sentiment yet
watch_list: BTC price action around $58,000 — a clean bounce here could signal the local bottom
TRUMP RSI — if it drops to 20-22 with a bullish candle reversal (hammer/morning star), that becomes a high-conviction oversold bounce trade
SOL relative strength — if SOL holds above $68 while BTC retests lows, it becomes the first mover on any recovery
market_context: Crypto is in a deep risk-off environment with BTC below $60K, Extreme Fear at 18, and institutional outflows from Binance. Headlines about rare back-to-back quarterly losses and regulatory pressure from EU/MiCA are suppressing any bullish sentiment.
context_banner: Extreme Fear dominates with BTC below $60K — capital preservation trumps opportunity-seeking until reversal signals emerge.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 18 (Extreme Fear) and worsening week-over-week from 15 to 18, indicating no sign of sentiment bottoming yet.
Bitcoin falls below $60,000 on track for rare back-to-back quarterly loss — a major bearish headline that sets the macro backdrop.
Binance posts over $400M in weekly net outflows as MiCA deadline nears, signaling institutional/exchange-level capital flight.
TRUMP RSI at 27 is deeply oversold, but Three Black Crows pattern and -1.4 chart bias mean the downtrend hasn't confirmed a reversal yet.
VELVET up 272% in 7 days near ATH with overbought RSI of 70 — parabolic move with extreme reversion risk, not a safe entry.
